findings.issue: Task description (line 26) still says 'проверяет `role === "agent"` — single-role check, contradicting the fixed pseudocode (step 2, line 62) which correctly checks `role !== 'agent' && role !== 'admin'`. An implementer reading the Description before the pseudocode gets conflicting signals. The critical finding from iter-1 was fixed in the pseudocode but the Description text was not updated to match.
findings.fix: Update Description line to: 'проверяет role === "agent" || role === "admin", затем создаёт статью через payload.create()'

findings.issue: TDD Anchor (line 109) and AC (line 115) reference status 'archived': 'get_excludes_draft_and_archived' and 'GET /api/articles не возвращает статьи со статусом `draft` или `archived`'. The articles collection in tech-spec Data Models defines only two status options: ['draft', 'published'] — there is no 'archived' status. The GET handler filters `status: { equals: 'published' }` which already excludes all non-published statuses including any hypothetical future ones. Testing for a specific 'archived' status is testing for a non-existent enum value.
findings.fix: Remove 'archived' from TDD anchor test name and AC: rename 'get_excludes_draft_and_archived' to 'get_excludes_draft', and update AC to 'GET /api/articles не возвращает статьи со статусом draft (только published)'. The filter `{ status: { equals: 'published' } }` in the GET handler already satisfies this.

findings.issue: Dependencies section (lines 196-198) still incorrectly names dependencies: 'Task 8 (Replace Prisma Data Layer)' should be cited as providing the data layer, not the articles collection; 'Task 9 (Users Collection & Roles)' is factually wrong — Task 9 is 'App Routes + Globals Integration', not a Users collection task. Users collection is created in Task 3. The articles collection is Task 6. This finding was flagged as major in iteration 1 but was NOT fixed.
findings.fix: Update Dependencies to: 'Task 6 (Articles Collection) — коллекция articles должна существовать; Task 3 (Payload Installation) — коллекция users с полем role создана как stub в onInit; depends_on: [8, 9] обеспечивает запуск после Wave 4, когда все коллекции (Tasks 4-7) уже определены.'

findings.issue: Dependencies section (lines 290-292) still incorrectly names: 'Task 8 должен — Posts collection в Payload определена' (Task 8 is 'Replace Prisma Data Layer', not Posts collection; Posts collection is Task 5); 'Task 9 должен — Users collection определена, API Key включён' (Task 9 is 'App Routes + Globals Integration'; sync user + API Key is Task 3 onInit). This finding was flagged as major in iteration 1 but was NOT fixed.
findings.fix: Update Dependencies to: 'Task 5 (Posts Collection) — коллекция posts с полями telegramMessageId+channelUsername и unique constraint определена; Task 3 (Payload Installation) — пользователь sync создан в onInit, API Key режим включён; depends_on: [8, 9] обеспечивает запуск после Wave 4.'

findings.issue: Context Files (lines 130-132) still reference `~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/` paths which do not exist on this machine. The skill files live at a user-global level that may not resolve correctly within Claude Code agent context. Task 12 correctly uses `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/` relative paths. This finding was flagged as minor in iteration 1 but was NOT fixed.
findings.fix: Replace `~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md` etc. with `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md` (relative from work/payload-cms/), matching Task 12's correct pattern.

findings.issue: Context Files (lines 240-241) still reference `~/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md` and `patterns.md` using the global `~/` prefix. Same issue as Task 10 — not fixed in iteration 1. Task 12 correctly uses `../../.claude/...`.
